item.title: META Resets Reality Labs, Grows Message Sales as Ad Engine Roars
item.description: As Meta's advertising business booms, the company buys itself time to further AI monetization through glasses, business messaging, and Manus.

item.title: Grab’s 2026 Selloff Had Reasons—But the Rebound Case Is Building
